steps.title: Use the exemplify clue
steps.content: The passage says the Alderwick editions used handmade materials and medieval-style ornamentation, and then says those elements exemplify artistry. The blank needs a phrase showing that Bell's rejection of industrialization is clearly expressed through those handcrafted features.

steps.title: Reject mismatched meanings
steps.content:
• Choice A: Being "insensible to" something means being unaware of or unaffected by it, which clashes with the idea that the materials express the stance.
  • Choice C: The materials do not scrutinize Bell's repudiation.
  • Choice D: The passage says the materials exemplify the stance, not complicate it.
The answer is B.
